evals.prompt: Create a settings form module called `search_settings` for configuring search parameters on a Drupal 10 site. The form at `/admin/config/search/search-settings` should have fields for: similarity_threshold (number, default 0.7), result_limit (number, default 5), and cache_ttl (number, default 300). Save all settings to config. Include a config schema file. We want D11 compatibility.
evals.expected_output: ConfigFormBase with getEditableConfigNames, config schema, route with _form key
expectations: Form class extends ConfigFormBase (not FormBase or ControllerBase) for the settings form
Form implements getEditableConfigNames() returning an array with the config object name
Config schema file exists at config/schema/search_settings.schema.yml with typed entries for each field
Schema uses appropriate types: 'integer' for numeric fields like result_limit and cache_ttl (not 'string' for everything)
If validation exists, it uses $form_state->setErrorByName() (not throwing exceptions or using drupal_set_message)
buildForm() calls parent::buildForm($form, $form_state) to get automatic submit button
submitForm() calls parent::submitForm($form, $form_state) for automatic status message
submitForm() uses $this->config() to get editable config (not \Drupal::configFactory()->getEditable())
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en search_settings returns exit code 0
E2E: Settings form renders -- navigate to /admin/config/search/search-settings as admin and verify form fields are present
